lifecycle.name: Capital Formation
lifecycle.description: Founder-side and operator-side fundraising — equity, debt, PE, fund formation

workers.name: Investor Relations
workers.capabilitySummary: Founder-side investor relations + capital formation co-pilot. Investor pipeline CRM (Approached → 1st mtg → 2nd mtg → diligence → term sheet → close). Apollo prospecting. Data room with scoped sharing and KYC. Cap table integration. Reg D / 506(b)/(c) compliance guardrails. Equity (KISS, SAFE, convertible, seed), debt placements, PE placements, fund formation. Communications via Marketing worker.

canvasTabs.label: Pipeline
canvasTabs.description: Investor funnel — Approached → Meeting → Diligence → Term Sheet → Closed

canvasTabs.label: Capital Raised
canvasTabs.description: Round target vs committed vs received; close-by-close ladder

canvasTabs.label: Governance
canvasTabs.description: Ballots, voting results, board observer cadence, quarterly notices

canvasTabs.label: Notices
canvasTabs.description: Outbound investor updates and required regulatory notices

canvasTabs.label: Vote
canvasTabs.description: Open ballots and your voting history

canvasTabs.label: Documents
canvasTabs.description: Your SAFE, signed agreements, and tax docs

workers._status_note: Flipped to live 2026-05-09 per user-counsel attestation pattern (project_user_counsel_attestation_pattern.md). The user's counsel attests at worker activation; SOCIII AI is not the legal-review authority. End-to-end dogfood test passed 2026-05-09. Voting + canvas tabs added 2026-05-29.

bundles.name: SOCIII Founder
bundles.description: Spine + Fundraise bundle for early-stage founders running a fundraise alongside the company.
bundles.replaces: $10K+/mo in solo-founder ops + investor relations support
